featureDetection.rationale: Validates CSS.supports('container-type: anchored') to toggle feature badges correctly.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Tooltips place statically and safely with clear notices if container query styling flips are unsupported.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Extremely realistic scrollable field with 4 independent anchored tooltip pins triggering real layout flips on scroll.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Excellent, real-world CSS scroll query demonstration.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Conforms strictly to design system variables with beautiful layouts.

references.rationale: Links directly to chromestatus.com/feature/5177580990496768 in the see also list.
